
===== 6CH ADC Event-Driven Burst Detector =====
Mode: continuous sampling, event-triggered FFT
Burst: 2-20ms sine, gap >= 30ms (per channel)
Amplitude range: 0.1V ~ 1.5V (dynamic threshold)
=================================================

=== FFT BENCHMARK (1024-pt, ch=0, 40KHz sine) ===
  Run #1: freq=40000.0 Hz  fft=0 cyc (0.00 us)
  Run #2: freq=40000.0 Hz  fft=0 cyc (0.00 us)
  Run #3: freq=40000.0 Hz  fft=0 cyc (0.00 us)
=================================================
